title: Social Media / Content Creation Internship
description:
About Us

Bertyverse Pte Ltd is a music and media production company focused on building artistes, shaping compelling artiste profiles, and creating culturally relevant content at scale. We work across a collective network of social media accounts with over 2 million followers across multiple platforms, spanning music, lifestyle, entertainment, and digital storytelling.

Our work sits at the intersection of music, media, and culture — from developing original artistes and creative IPs to producing large-scale campaigns, live activations, and national events, including Chingay. We believe in storytelling that connects deeply, performs strongly, and resonates with audiences both online and offline.

At our core, we’re builders and creatives. We move fast, experiment boldly, and believe great ideas come from collaboration, trust, and hands-on execution. If you’re excited about shaping the next generation of artistes and content in Asia’s evolving media landscape, you’ll feel right at home here.

Why Join Us?

At Bertyverse, you won’t just be doing tasks — you’ll be part of the creative engine.

  • Real creative exposure: Work directly on live projects involving artistes, content creation, and major cultural events like Chingay.

  • Hands-on learning: This is a fast-paced, build-as-you-go environment. You’ll learn by doing, testing, and refining alongside a small, driven team.

  • Impact-driven culture: No corporate fluff. We value initiative, ideas, and people who take ownership. If you’re curious, adaptable, and creative, you’ll thrive here.

The Role

You will support the music and media team in executing social media and content strategies that grow artiste profiles, engage large-scale online communities, and support ongoing productions and campaigns. You’ll be involved across content planning, shoots, live activations, and community engagement, functioning as a core support member of the creative and marketing team.

Main Responsibilities

  • Assist with posting operations and scheduling across multiple social media platforms, ensuring consistency and timely execution

  • Support content shoots, live events, and activations, including national events such as Chingay

  • Assist in ideation, coordination, and execution of social media campaigns, LIVE content, and community engagement initiatives

  • Support the creation of content briefs and liaise with internal and external stakeholders (artistes, creatives, partners)

  • Provide community management support, including monitoring and responding to comments, messages, and queries

  • Assist with social performance tracking, trend monitoring, and audience research

  • Research and propose fresh content ideas, formats, and platform trends relevant to music, artistes, and digital media

Bonus: Ability to ideate, shoot, and edit engaging short-form video content for social platforms

Requirements

  • Strong multitasking and organisational skills

  • Comfortable working in a fast-moving, creative environment

  • Familiarity with social media platforms, trends, and best practices

  • Proficient in Google Suite (Docs, Slides, Sheets)

  • Able to work independently, adapt quickly, and stay responsive under pressure

  • Experience with video editing tools such as Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or CapCut is a plus

  • Prior experience in music, media, marketing, content creation, photography, or videography is a bonus

  • 6-month full-time commitment preferred (school attachment programmes welcomed)

Benefits

  • Market-level internship allowance

  • Direct exposure to artiste development, media production, and large-scale cultural projects
